routineText:
09:00 — Wake up
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
| — whole wheat bread 70g
| — 3 eggs with olive oil 5g
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
-----------------------

14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
| — brown rice boiled (70g raw)
| — kefta cooked (250g raw) with 1/2 onion
| — 300g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)
-----------------------

18:00 — Black coffee · Water 1L
18:00
      — (4h) Rest
22:00

-----------------------
| 22:00 — 🌙 Dinner
| — 2 scoops of protein powder
| — 2 perly nature
| — 20g mixed nuts (almonds, walnuts, pistachios)
-----------------------

01:00 — Sleep

adjustments.reason: Protein at 73% (bad) — the quickest lever at dinner without changing breakfast
+6.5g protein + calcium boost — pairs well with the extra whey scoop to reach 92% protein

verdict.text_html: Improved — 1,870 kcal (+70 vs rest target). Protein rescued to 92% — fiber still needs work.

coverage.name: Protein
coverage.note: 2 scoops whey + 2 perly bring protein into good zone

coverage.name: Carbs
coverage.note: Rice, bread, veg — right on target

coverage.name: Fat
coverage.note: Kefta drives most of the fat — extra perly adds 5g more

coverage.name: Fiber
coverage.note: Structural gap — add 100g spinach to sauté next time

coverage.name: Gas / bloat risk
coverage.note: No change to gas risk — all veg still cooked

coverage.name: Protocol adherence
coverage.note: Dinner still at 22:00 — timing issue remains

good: Protein recovered to 92% — good zone, no breakfast change needed
Calories land within 70 kcal of rest-day target
bad: Fiber still at 60% — add 100g spinach to sauté next time
Fat at 120% (warn) — kefta is the main driver, structural for this meal plan
Dinner timing (22:00) remains a protocol breach

2 perly natures 408mg + eggs 75mg + bread 20mg — big improvement
